name: @revinel/browser
description: Browser runtime helpers for embedding the Revinel advertiser tier selector.
author: Piotr Kulpinski

scripts.build: tsdown && bun run prepare-package && bun run sync:embed
scripts.pub:release: bun run build && npm publish ./dist --access public
scripts.pub:beta: bun run build && npm publish ./dist --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks
scripts.pub:next: bun run build && npm publish ./dist --access public --tag next --no-git-checks
